title: Soap
description: Adds soap to the game that can clean blocks.
body:
Soap
-
Adds soap to the game that can clean blocks, such as Crying Obsidian or Green Concrete Powder.

What does the mod add?
-
The mod adds Soap that can clean blocks, and for example, using Red Soap will turn all colored blocks red, and so on.                                                        
If you eat the soap, you will be able to clean blocks with your bare hands.

![Some of the blocks that soap can clean](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f0cbe512736af6e1a2afcc7269b5e9ab84de29f.png)

<details>
<summary>Advancements</summary>

![Why did I do that? Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9443f7d6a5b59dde3b8d8ef3abad7b315f9e76ff.png)
![Cleanliness Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf3365a865cdba9646b6f09fa128f16cea1aaceb.png)


</details>

<details>
<summary>Soap colors</summary>

![Soaps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41e5a4b1017c1196cb37ec1ee0eab6be97e436c0.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>All the blocks that soap can clean</summary>

All types of copper, except waxed                                                                            
All types of wool                                                                            
All types of woolen carpet             
All types of banners                                                                            
All types of concrete                                                                            
All types of concrete powder                                                                            
All types of mossy blocks                                                                            
All types of coral                                                                            
Crying obsidian                                                                            

</details>

Recipes
-
Recipes will appear in the recipe book when you pick up a [honeycomb](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Honeycomb) or [dye](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dye).

![Soap Craft Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc20c2fbfbb9e01b57cd259b6d38c76207715714.png)        ![Soap Craft Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb78b2edd4fb0209076998fc8fb68815aa9a40fb.gif)
